lints.name: extension_in_public
lints.detail: Extension pg_net is installed in the public schema. Move it to another schema.

lints.name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
lints.detail: Function public.increment_download_count(token_id uuid) can be executed by the anon role as a SECURITY DEFINER function via /rest/v1/rpc/increment_download_count.

lints.name: auth_allow_anonymous_sign_ins
lints.detail: RLS policies enforced on roles that allow access to anonymous users. Affected tables (policy lists in raw transcript):
affected_tables: public.custom_itinerary_requests {Admins can delete requests, Users and admins can select requests, Users and admins can update requests}
public.order_items {Admins can delete order_items, Admins can update order_items, Users and admins can select order_items}
public.orders {Admins can delete orders, Admins can update orders, Users and admins can select orders}

lints.name: auth_leaked_password_protection
lints.detail: Leaked password protection is currently disabled (HaveIBeenPwned check).
